RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/JLW) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-28-2005 Continued To Jun-19-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2005 Continued To May-31-06 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 606

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial Date
Off Calendar Dec-28-2005 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance With Psychological Examination And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants' Motion To Compel Compliance With Psychological Examination is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to participate in the examination pursuant to the protocols established by Dr. Hooker, pursuant to accepted professional standards.
The court finds that Plaintiff's failure to participate in and complete the examination on September 7, 2005 was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $2,000, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Failure to comply with this order may result in further sanctions, including evidentiary sanctions. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Motion To Compel Psychological Examination Of Pltf
Off Calendar Aug-24-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants' Motion To Compel Psychological Examination of Plaintiff is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
